data.title: 国际服卡池复刻「Don't think it. Feel it.」&「So you've arrived, Sensei. Heehee. Are you in need of my strength?」

data.body:
[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 5/12 (Tue)!

💌Pick-Up Students: 3★ Kisaki, 3★ Reijo
🗓️Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 5/12 (Tue) After Maintenance – 5/26 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
